meta.title: AfyaTrust — Health Without Financial Shock
meta.description: AfyaTrust helps riders, traders, vendors and families access healthcare through affordable monthly health memberships. Built for informal workers & families in Tanzania.

about.title: Health is the one thing that shouldn't wait for payday.
about.intro: We're building health protection for the people who keep Tanzania moving — riders, traders, vendors and families. Not insurance. Access.
about.storyP1: We grew up around people who work with their hands and their hours. A rider who pushes through a fever because a clinic visit costs a day's pay. A mama who delays her own care to cover school fees. When the money isn't there, treatment waits — and small problems become emergencies.
about.storyP2: AfyaTrust started with one belief: one sickness should never undo a lifetime of work. So we built something simple — a small monthly membership that lets you walk into a partner clinic and be treated, without cash at the counter.
about.quote: We're not here to sell policies. We're here so that the next fever doesn't become the thing that sets a family back a year.
about.teamTitle: A small team, close to the ground.
about.fieldTitle: Every plan we build starts here — listening first.
about.fieldAlt: AfyaTrust team talking with a trader at Kariakoo market
about.fieldCaption: In the market with the people we serve. We sit with traders and riders to learn what protection should really cost — before we ever design a plan.

beliefs.title: Start in the market
beliefs.desc: Every plan begins with the people who'll use it — not a boardroom.

beliefs.title: Cash should never decide
beliefs.desc: No one should weigh a fever against a day's earnings.

beliefs.title: Protect the work
beliefs.desc: Healthy people keep riding, trading and providing. That's the goal.

about.ctaTitle: Join the people protecting their work.
